task_yaml.task:
I came across this cropped close-up of a space image with no caption and I
want to know exactly what astronomical object it shows and find the original
NASA image record (not a blog or news copy). The image is here:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/crop.jpg

It's only a detail of a larger image, with no text or labels, so identify the
object from the picture itself and then trace it back to NASA's authoritative
source.

Tell me:
- what astronomical object this is,
- which NASA telescope/instrument took it (if determinable),
- the NASA image id and the canonical NASA image-library / JPL record URL,
- the approximate release date.

Save your conclusion and the supporting evidence (how you identified it, and
the canonical NASA record URL) to
`/tmp_workspace/results/image_provenance.json`, plus notes/screenshots under
`/tmp_workspace/results/`.
